SPACEMERCS-STRIKE_COSMOPALADIN.title: Strike
SPACEMERCS-DEFEND_COSMOPALADIN.title: Defend
SPACEMERCS-THROWING_HAMMER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
|}Gain {CurePower:diff()} [pink]Cure[/pink].
Apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [orange]Scorch[/orange].
Put this {IfUpgraded:show:back in your hand.|on top of your draw pile.}
SPACEMERCS-THROWING_HAMMER.title: Throwing Hammer
SPACEMERCS-HAMMER_STRIKE.title: Hammer Strike
SPACEMERCS-SMOKE_SCREEN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Reduce the cost of a random card in your hand by 1.
SPACEMERCS-SMOKE_SCREEN.title: Smoke Screen
SPACEMERCS-TACTICAL_STRAFE.title: Tactical Strafe
SPACEMERCS-JETPACK.title: Jetpack
SPACEMERCS-REMEMBERED_VOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Increase {IfUpgraded:show:both|one randomly} by 1 permanently.
Costs 1 less is [gold]Broken Oath[/gold] is not in your deck.
SPACEMERCS-REMEMBERED_VOW.title: Remembered Vow
SPACEMERCS-BROKEN_OATH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Costs 1 less if [gold]Remembered Vow[/gold] is not in your deck.
SPACEMERCS-BROKEN_OATH.title: Broken Oath
SPACEMERCS-INCENDIARY_GRENADE.title: Incendiary Grenade
SPACEMERCS-THERMITE_GRENADE.description: At the start of your turn, apply {ThermitePower:diff()} [orange]Scorch[/orange] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-THERMITE_GRENADE.title: Thermite Grenade
SPACEMERCS-FUSION_GRENADE.title: Fusion Grenade
SPACEMERCS-ASHES_TO_ASHES.description: Whenever you play a card containing "Grenade", return it to your hand.
SPACEMERCS-ASHES_TO_ASHES.title: Ashes to Ashes
SPACEMERCS-SOLAR_RAMPART.description:
[gold]Unplayable[/gold] unless the previous card played was a skill.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {CurePower:diff()} [pink]Cure[/pink].
SPACEMERCS-SOLAR_RAMPART.title: Solar Rampart
SPACEMERCS-FIERY_SPLENDOR.title: Fiery Splendor
SPACEMERCS-CAUTERIZE.title: Cauterize
SPACEMERCS-BRING_THE_HEAT.description: Deal damage to ALL enemies equal to {IfUpgraded:show:double }your [pink]Cure[/pink].
SPACEMERCS-BRING_THE_HEAT.title: Bring the Heat
SPACEMERCS-BURNING_FISTS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [orange]Scorch[/orange] equal to your [pink]Cure[/pink].
SPACEMERCS-BURNING_FISTS.title: Burning Fists
SPACEMERCS-PERCUSSIVE_FLAMES.description:
Whenever you apply [orange]Scorch[/orange], apply 1 more.
Add {Burns:diff()} [gold]Burn{IfUpgraded:show:|s}[/gold] to your hand.
SPACEMERCS-PERCUSSIVE_FLAMES.title: Percussive Flames
SPACEMERCS-CONSECRATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies twice.
Heal hp equal to the unblocked damage.
SPACEMERCS-CONSECRATE.title: Consecrate
SPACEMERCS-FORGE_MASTER.description:
Ignitions you cause apply 2 [orange]Scorch[/orange].
ALL [red]Ignitions[/red] deal 30 damage to all other enemies instead.
SPACEMERCS-FORGE_MASTER.title: Forge Master
SPACEMERCS-SUNFIRE_FURNACE.description:
Gain {CurePower:diff()} [pink]Cure[/pink].
You cannot lose [pink]Cure[/pink] until your next turn.
SPACEMERCS-SUNFIRE_FURNACE.title: Sunfire Furnace
SPACEMERCS-PHOENIX_RISING.title: Phoenix Rising
SPACEMERCS-BURNING_TREADS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [orange]Scorch[/orange].
Until end of turn, whenever you play a card, apply {BurningTreadsPower:diff()} [orange]Scorch[/orange] to the enemy.
SPACEMERCS-BURNING_TREADS.title: Burning Treads
SPACEMERCS-FIREWALKER.title: Firewalker
